If you do, Army of Allah becomes a 0/0 creature with haste and indestructible until end of turn. It’s still an enchantment. Whenever you cast a Knight spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Army of Allah.

At the beginning of enchanted player’s upkeep, they remove an ink counter and draw a card. When there are no more ink counters on it, sacrifice Contract from Below and enchanted player discards their hand.

card.rules: When Prodigal Sorcerer enters, it deals 1 damage to any target. T: Prodigal Sorcerer deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Rag Man
card.rules: Menace When Rag Man enters, you may have target player discard a card. They discard two cards instead if they are enchanted. Channel — 1B, Discard Rag Man: Search your library for a curse card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Raging River
card.rules: Choose one: —Shuffle each creature into its owner’s library. —Shuffle each enchantment into its owner’s library. —Shuffle each artifact into its owner’s library.

card.name: Regrowth
card.rules: Return target card from your graveyard to your hand. Flashback 2BG (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Resurrection
card.rules: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Flashback 3WB (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Ring of Immortals
card.rules: When Ring of Immortals enters, attach it to target creature you control. Equipped creature gets +1/+1. When equipped creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped at the beginning of the next end step. Equip 4

card.name: Roc of Kher Ridges
card.rules: Flying, provoke (When this attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block it if able.) 1: Roc of Kher Ridges loses flying and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Runesword
card.rules: Equipped creature has deathtouch and lifelink. When equipped creature dies, you draw two cards and lose 2 life. Equip 3

card.name: Sacrifice
card.rules: Target player sacrifices a creature. Flashback 5BR (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Savannah Lions
card.rules: Kicker 2G Create a 2/1 white Cat creature token with first strike. If this spell was kicked, instead create two 2/1 white Cat creature tokens with first strike. Then each of those tokens fights target creature.

card.name: Scryb Sprites
card.rules: When Scryb Sprites enters, create a 1/1 green Faerie creature token with flying. 3G/U, T: Create a 1/1 green Faerie creature token with flying.

card.name: Season of the Witch
card.rules: Enchant player At the beginning of combat on your turn, create an X/X black Witch creature token with haste, where X is equal to the number of curses attached to enchanted player. Sacrifice that token at end of combat. 4B, T: Search your library for a curse card and reveal it. If you do, cast it without paying its mana cost then shuffle.

card.name: Simulacrum
card.rules: If a source would deal damage to you, instead prevent that damage and put that many soul counters on Simulacrum. When Simulacrum has ten or more soul counters on it, sacrifice it.

card.name: Smoke
card.rules: Choose one: —Put a stun counter on up to two target creatures. —Put a stun counter on up to two target lands. Entwine—Tap an untapped elemental you control and put a stun counter on it. (Choose both if you pay the entwine cost.)

card.name: Soul Net
card.rules: Whenever a creature dies, you gain 1 life. 2W/B, T, Sacrifice Soul Net: Create two 1/1 white spirit creature tokens with flying.

card.name: Stream of Life
card.rules: T: Gain 1 life. Channel — XG/W, Discard Stream of Life: Target player gains X+4 life.

card.name: Sunglasses of Urza
card.rules: Equipped creature gets +1/+0. Whenever equipped creature becomes blocked, Sunglasses of Urza deals 2 damage to defending player. Equip 1

card.name: Swamp Mosquito
card.rules: Flying Whenever Swamp Mosquito attacks and isn’t blocked, defending player gets a poison counter. (A player with ten or more poison counters loses the game.) 2B, Exile Swamp Mosquito from your graveyard: Target player gets three poison counters.

card.name: Tranquility
card.rules: Whenever you cast an enchantment spell, draw a card. You may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast aura spells that target permanents you control.

card.name: Varchild's Crusader
card.rules: Varchild’s Crusader gets +1/+1 for each equipment and aura attached to it. As long as Varchild’s Crusader’s power is 5 of greater, it has double strike.

card.name: Wall of Ice
card.rules: Defender, trample Put a stun counter on creatures blocking or blocked by Wall of Ice. 1G: Wall of Ice gets +2/+0 and loses defender until end of turn.

card.name: Wanderlust
card.rules: Enchant player The first creature enchanted player casts each turn enters tapped with a stun counter on it. Channel — 2G, Discard Wanderlust: Search your library for a land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Whirling Dervish
card.rules: Whirling Dervish gets +1/+1 for each equipment and aura attached to it. As long as Whirling Dervish’s power is 5 or greater, it has trample.

card.name: Winter's Night
card.rules: T: Add G or R. Whenever a snow permanent is tapped for mana, its controller adds C in addition to the mana that permanent produced.

card.name: Glasses of Urza
card.rules: When Glasses of Urza enters, scry 1 then draw a card. Equipped creature has ward 1 and “T: Scry 1.” Equip 1

card.name: Ankh of Mishra
card.rules: T: Add an amount of C equal to the number of enchantments you control.

card.name: Apocalypse Chime
card.rules: 3H/W, T: Destroy target enchantment. 3H/U, T: Target player mills 3. 3H/B, T: Put a -1/-1 counter on target creature 3H/R, T: Each creature attacks this turn if able. 3H/G, T: Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Arcum's Sleigh
card.rules: Vigilance S: Arcum’s Sleigh can’t be blocked this turn. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or greater: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Basalt Monolith
card.rules: T: Add CCC. Put a stun counter on Basalt Monolith. 3: Target attacking or blocking creatures loses all abilities and becomes a 0/2 with defender. Activate this ability only once each turn.

card.name: Black Lotus
card.rules: (H can be paid with C or 2 life. C represents colorless mana and can’t be paid for with colored mana.) T: Add one mana of any color. C, T, Sacrifice Black Lotus: Add three mana of any one color.

card.name: Celestial Prism
card.rules: T: Add one mana of any color. 2WUBRG, T: Exile target permanent.

card.name: Chromatic Armor
card.rules: Sunburst (This enters the battlefield with a charge counter on it for each color of mana spent to cast it.) Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Remove a charge counter from Chromatic Armor: Equipped creature gains protection from the color of your choice until end of turn. Equip 1

card.name: Clockwork Beast
card.rules: Trample Clockwork Beast enters with nine +1/+1 counters on it. Whenever Clockwork Beast attacks or blocks, remove a +1/+1 counter from it at end of combat.

card.name: Colossus of Sardia
card.rules: Ward 3 Colossus of Sardia can’t be blocked by creatures with power 3 or less.

card.name: Conservator
card.rules: 1, T: Prevent the next 2 damage that would be dealt to you this turn.

card.name: Copper Tablet
card.rules: Copper Tablet enters with three leaflet counters on it. 1, T, Remove a leaflet counter from Copper Tablet: Scry 2. When Copper Tablet has no charge counters on it, shuffle it into its owner’s library. (The shuffle triggers before the scry.)

card.name: Dingus Egg
card.rules: Dingus Egg enters with two shell counters on it. 2, T: Remove a shell counter from Dingus Egg. Then if there are no shell counters on it, sacrifice it and create a 8/8 colorless Dinosaur token with haste.

card.name: Helm of Chatzuk
card.rules: (H can be paid with C or 2 life) Equipped creature gets +2/+2 and has vigilance and menace. Equip H.

card.name: The Hive
card.rules: When The Hive enters, create five 1/1 colorless Wasp artifact creature tokens with flying. T: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Illusionary Mask
card.rules: 3: Manifest a card from your hand or the top card of your library (To manifest a card, put it onto the battlefield face down as a 2/2 creature. Turn it face up any time for its mana cost if it’s a creature card.) Equipped creature gets +1/+1 for each colorless nonland permanent you control. Equip 2

card.name: Jade Monolith
card.rules: T: Add one mana of any color. 3, T: Proliferate (Choose any number of permanents and/or players with counters on them, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Jade Statue
card.rules: Trample When Jade Statue enters or leaves the battlefield, create a treasure token. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or greater: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Juggernaut
card.rules: Trample, can’t be blocked by creatures with defender. Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or greater: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Living Artifact
card.rules: Each evoke, kicker, and channel cost you pay costs 1 less. 4: Living Artifact becomes a 3/3 artifact creature until end of turn.

card.name: Mana Vault
card.rules: Hexproof Sacrifice a land: Put two charge counters on Mana Vault. Activate this ability only during your upkeep and only once each turn. T: Add C for each charge counter on Mana Vault.

card.name: North Star
card.rules: T: Add C. 2S, T: Search your library for a snow card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Obsianus Golem
card.rules: Trample, ward 2 If a nonelemental source would deal damage to Obsianus Golem, prevent half that damage rounded down.

card.name: Winter Orb
card.rules: T: Add C. At the beginning of each player’s upkeep you may untap up to one snow permanent you control.

card.name: Badlands
card.rules: Badlands enters tapped unless you pay 1. (T: Add B or R.)

card.name: Bayou
card.rules: Bayou enters tapped unless you pay 1. (T: Add B or G.)

card.name: City of Brass
card.rules: T: Add one mana of any color. City of Brass deals 1 damage to you. 1: City of Brass becomes a 1/3 artifact creature until end of turn. It’s still a land. It doesn’t untap during its controller’s next untap step.

card.name: Hot Springs
card.rules: T: Add C. 1, T: Prevent the next 1 damage that would be dealt to you this turn. 1S, T: Gain 2 life.

card.name: Howling Mine
card.rules: When Howling Mine enters, sacrifice it unless you pay 2. At the beginning of each player’s draw step, that player draws an additional card. T: Add one mana of any color. Howling Mine deals 1 damage to you.

card.name: Ivory Tower
card.rules: T: Add one mana of any color. Each opponent gains 1 life. 8: Ivory Tower becomes a 3/3 Elephant creature with trample and indestructible until end of turn. It’s still a land.

card.name: Koskun Falls
card.rules: T: Add C. 1, T: Add one mana of any color. 3S, T: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Plateau
card.rules: Plateau enters tapped unless you pay 1. (T: Add R or W.)

card.name: Savannah
card.rules: Savannah enters tapped unless you pay 1. (T: Add G or W.)

card.name: Scrubland
card.rules: Scrubland enters tapped unless you pay 1. (T: Add W or B.)

card.name: Snow Fortress
card.rules: T: Add one mana of any color. Use this mana only to cast snow spells or activate abilities of snow permanents. 1S: Put a +1/+1 counter on Snow Fortress. It becomes a 0/0 creature until end of turn. It’s still a land. 2S: Return Snow Fortress from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Taiga
card.rules: Taiga enters tapped unless you pay 1. (T: Add R or G)

card.name: Thawing Glaciers
card.rules: Thawing Glaciers enters tapped. T: Add C. 1S, T, Sacrifice Thawing Glaciers: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Tropical Island
card.rules: Tropical Island enters tapped unless you pay 1. (T: Add G or U.)

card.name: Tundra
card.rules: Tundra enters tapped unless you pay 1. (T: Add W or U.)

card.name: Underground River
card.rules: Underground River enters tapped unless you pay 1. (T: Add U or B.)

card.name: Volcanic Island
card.rules: Volcanic Island enters tapped unless you pay 1. (T: Add U or R.)
